"junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/tnunnink/Documents/Projects/logixdb/src/LogixDb.sln", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.C#", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "SQLite", "TSQL" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Make `Enum.Parse<FileType>` case-insensitive in file type resolution
Add unit tests for `Import` creation, file type detection, metadata population, and logging methods.
Add unit tests for `PutImport` and `LogImport` methods in SQL Server and SQLite implementations, and enhance `PutImport` to include additional import properties.
Update `PutImport` and `LogImport` in SQL Server and SQLite managers to map enums to strings and include additional properties
Bump version to 0.15.0 for Service and CLI projects
Update `LogImport` methods to use `PostLog` script and allow nullable `log_exception` in `import_log` table
Update `.idea` workspace configuration to reflect recent changes in scripts, logging, and metadata settings.
Refactor file upload and import workflows: update `Target.Create` method, rename `Import` properties, and remove redundant `DropPath`. Added logging to write to database for import process
Bump `LogixConverter.LogixSdk` package version to 0.2.2 in CLI project.
Refactor `Target.Create` method to include project name, update related tests for SQL Server and SQLite.

Refactor target and import workflows: update test assertions for SQLite and SQL Server to use `TestProject` key, improve `PutImport` test coverage with additional properties, and add `content_hash` to `MergeModule` scripts.
Refactor import workflows: replace `TempFile` property with `GetTempFile` method, update related CLI commands and tests, and improve logging consistency.
Refactor migrations to standardize schema usage: replace explicit schema definitions with `InLogixSchema` extension method for tables and indexes, and update related FluentMigrator extensions.
Refactor scripts: reorganize SQLite and SQL Server scripts into `Queries`, `Migrations`, and `Merges` directories for improved structure.
Moving to DbUp: Add SQLite migrations for core database schema and seed logic, implement `SqliteMigrator` for streamlined upgrades, and refactor `SqliteManager` to use DbUp for migration execution.
Remove `SqliteManager` and `SqliteScript`, introduce `SqliteProvider` and refactor SQLite migrations, schemas, and workflows for improved structure and autoincrement primary keys.

Remove deprecated classes (`ComponentOptions`, `DatabaseResolver`, `DropCommand`, `MigrationTag`) and associated tests (`DropCommandTests`, `SqlDbDropTests`, `SqliteDbDropTests`) while introducing `ScriptName` and updating related workflows for better script management and maintainability.
Remove `SqlServerManager` and its references; add SQL Server scripts for core schema migration and seed logic.
Remove QA framework: delete `qa` schema, related types, tables, procedures, functions, views, and associated FluentMigrator migrations.
Refactor database interactions: replace `Database` references with `Manager` or `Migrator`, remove outdated migration project, and adjust tests for SQL Server to reflect updated workflows.
Remove `Logix_20260308_002_SeedNativeOperands.sql` migration script.
Standardize SQL scripts and migrations: format index definitions, replace `REAL` data type with `NUMERIC`, adjust table and column references, and update associated tests and workflows.
Remove redundant SQLite migration tests and apply minor formatting improvements to `MergeTagValue.sql`.
Refactor SQL scripts: replace `dbo` schema references with `logix` for consistency across merge scripts.
Refactor SQL scripts: replaced `dbo` schema references with `logix`, removed unused queries, and updated cleanup logic to improve consistency and maintainability.
Update unit tests to use `logix` schema references for table validation, ensuring consistency with recent SQL script refactors.
Remove `LogixDb.Migrations` project and all associated migration scripts, extensions, and references, aligning with the migration workflow refactor.
Update unit tests and SQL migrations to align with `logix` schema adjustments; remove redundant tests and duplicate schema creation logic.
Replace `Logix_20260226_001_SqlServerConfigureServiceAccount.sql` with `Logix_20260201_003_ConfigurePermissions.sql` for refined service user setup and schema permissions.
Update `SqlDbGetTargetTests` to handle nullable assertions, remove unused `SQLitePCLRaw.core` reference, and clean up `SqlServerTestContainer` by removing redundant `IDbManager` property.
Remove unused `FluentMigrator` package references, update assertions in `SqliteDbGetTargetTests`, and refine table output structure in CLI commands.
Rename and refactor SQL migration scripts to align with updated naming conventions and enhance Windows-specific service account handling, schema authorization, and security settings.
Remove obsolete migration calls and `SetUp` methods from SQLite unit tests, ensuring consistency with updated migration workflow.
Add unit tests for `ImportTarget`, covering data type imports, nested structures, version tracking, and member records.
Remove `For` method from `ColumnMap`, streamline `DbConnectionInfo` trust parsing, and improve null value handling in column hash serialization.
Remove unused `LogixDb.Data.Abstractions` imports and simplify `PurgeCommand` option description.
Refactor commands to remove redundant `ParseConnection` calls; add `TruncateCommand` and support for SQL Server in database operations.
Add `DataTypeMapTests` to validate table generation and hashing logic; rename and refactor SQLite `DataTypeTests` to `DataTypeImportTests`.
Uncomment `SqlServerProvider` registration, update default `DbConnection` value.
Add unit tests for LogixDb.Maps, covering table generation and hashing logic for Task, Program, Routine, Tag, Module, Rung, AOI, and Controller entities.
Add unit tests for table generation and hashing logic across maps, including Tag, Module, Rung, AOI, and DataType entities.
Refactoring the test libraries and how the global SQL Server and Sqlite test database instancesa are managed to imporve test speed and code reuse across other testing projects
Introduce SQL Server integration test environment and update tests to utilize transient database for enhanced test isolation
Add `ToString` override for `DbConnectionInfo` to generate provider-specific connection strings; introduce `CustomWebApplicationFactory` for enhanced test configuration management.
Refactor SQLite test database to improve test isolation and lifecycle management; remove redundant test setup steps and consolidate connection handling with `TestEnvironment`.
Refactor `SourceUploadService` to throw exceptions for session creation errors, update AOI map hashing test with additional fields, and refine `TagImportTests` logic and assertions.
Refactor `SourceUploadService` to simplify exception handling and improve error logging in file upload endpoints.
Add `With` method to `TestSource` for streamlined component configuration; expand and restructure README for improved documentation clarity.

Refactor test database lifecycle management for SQL Server and SQLite: replace `StartAsync`/`StopAsync` with `BuildAsync`/`DisposeAsync` for improved resource handling; update related tests accordingly.

MESSAGE.value: Refactor SQL scripts: replaced `dbo` schema references with `logix`, removed unused queries, and updated cleanup logic to improve consistency and maintainability.
Update unit tests to use `logix` schema references for table validation, ensuring consistency with recent SQL script refactors.
Remove `LogixDb.Migrations` project and all associated migration scripts, extensions, and references, aligning with the migration workflow refactor.
Update unit tests and SQL migrations to align with `logix` schema adjustments; remove redundant tests and duplicate schema creation logic.
Replace `Logix_20260226_001_SqlServerConfigureServiceAccount.sql` with `Logix_20260201_003_ConfigurePermissions.sql` for refined service user setup and schema permissions.
Update `SqlDbGetTargetTests` to handle nullable assertions, remove unused `SQLitePCLRaw.core` reference, and clean up `SqlServerTestContainer` by removing redundant `IDbManager` property.
Remove unused `FluentMigrator` package references, update assertions in `SqliteDbGetTargetTests`, and refine table output structure in CLI commands.
Rename and refactor SQL migration scripts to align with updated naming conventions and enhance Windows-specific service account handling, schema authorization, and security settings.
Remove obsolete migration calls and `SetUp` methods from SQLite unit tests, ensuring consistency with updated migration workflow.
Add unit tests for `ImportTarget`, covering data type imports, nested structures, version tracking, and member records.
Remove `For` method from `ColumnMap`, streamline `DbConnectionInfo` trust parsing, and improve null value handling in column hash serialization.
Remove unused `LogixDb.Data.Abstractions` imports and simplify `PurgeCommand` option description.
Refactor commands to remove redundant `ParseConnection` calls; add `TruncateCommand` and support for SQL Server in database operations.
Add `DataTypeMapTests` to validate table generation and hashing logic; rename and refactor SQLite `DataTypeTests` to `DataTypeImportTests`.
Uncomment `SqlServerProvider` registration, update default `DbConnection` value.
Add unit tests for LogixDb.Maps, covering table generation and hashing logic for Task, Program, Routine, Tag, Module, Rung, AOI, and Controller entities.
Add unit tests for table generation and hashing logic across maps, including Tag, Module, Rung, AOI, and DataType entities.
Refactoring the test libraries and how the global SQL Server and Sqlite test database instancesa are managed to imporve test speed and code reuse across other testing projects
Introduce SQL Server integration test environment and update tests to utilize transient database for enhanced test isolation
Add `ToString` override for `DbConnectionInfo` to generate provider-specific connection strings; introduce `CustomWebApplicationFactory` for enhanced test configuration management.
Refactor SQLite test database to improve test isolation and lifecycle management; remove redundant test setup steps and consolidate connection handling with `TestEnvironment`.
Refactor `SourceUploadService` to throw exceptions for session creation errors, update AOI map hashing test with additional fields, and refine `TagImportTests` logic and assertions.
Refactor `SourceUploadService` to simplify exception handling and improve error logging in file upload endpoints.
Add `With` method to `TestSource` for streamlined component configuration; expand and restructure README for improved documentation clarity.

Refactor test database lifecycle management for SQL Server and SQLite: replace `StartAsync`/`StopAsync` with `BuildAsync`/`DisposeAsync` for improved resource handling; update related tests accordingly.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Refactor test database lifecycle management for SQL Server and SQLite: replace `StartAsync`/`StopAsync` with `BuildAsync`/`DisposeAsync` for improved resource handling; update related tests accordingly.
